SourceProxy.label: SHYX Adaptive Isotropic Remesher Test
SourceProxy.name: SHYXAdaptiveIsotropicRemesherTest

Documentation.short_help: Preview sizing, vertex ICC curvature, and per-triangle ICC measures (debug) without remeshing.

SourceProxy.Documentation:
Builds the same CGAL constrained-edge graph and evaluates the dual per-vertex sizing maps (VespaAdaptiveSizeGlobal / VespaAdaptiveSizeFeature, clamped to min/max edge length) used when FeatureSizingStandAlone is ON. Uncapped analytical targets VespaAdaptiveSizeGlobalUncapped / VespaAdaptiveSizeFeatureUncapped use sqrt(6*tol/|κ|max - 3*tol^2) from the same principal curvatures with no [min,max] clamp (NaN when the formula is not valid). PrepareIccVertexNormalsForAdaptiveSizing still builds `v:vespa_icc_normal` (and dual-region ICC maps when the Feature mask resolves) as in vtkSHYXAdaptiveIsotropicRemesher but does not expose that field as VTK. Point scalars VespaIccPrincipalCurvatureMin/Max, VespaIccMeanCurvature (H = (κ_min+κ_max)/2), and VespaIccGaussianCurvature (K = κ_min κ_max) come from CGAL interpolated_corrected_curvatures with the same vertex_normal_map and patch domain as the sizing preview (NaN outside an expanded patch when a remesh region is set). Cell arrays VespaIccTriangleMu0/Mu1/Mu2 are the CGAL per-triangle interpolated corrected measures mu^(0/1/2) before vertex aggregation. Input geometry is unchanged (no isotropic remeshing). Requires positive Feature Min/Max Edge Length and Feature Adaptive Tolerance plus global sizing parameters.
With vtkSelection on port 1 (default remesh region source), or a scalar range on the input, curvature for the sizing field uses the same expanded patch as the remesher (CGAL Face_filtered_graph semantics).
Outputs: 0 Copy of the input surface: point arrays VespaAdaptiveSizeGlobal, VespaAdaptiveSizeFeature, VespaAdaptiveSizeGlobalUncapped, VespaAdaptiveSizeFeatureUncapped, VespaIccPrincipalCurvatureMin/Max, VespaIccMeanCurvature, VespaIccGaussianCurvature; cell arrays VespaIccTriangleMu0, VespaIccTriangleMu1, VespaIccTriangleMu2 (triangles only; NaN on non-triangles). 1 Sharp/feature constraint edges as lines (same detection pipeline as the remesher when Detect feature edges is ON); never adds vertex cells. 2 Input geometry restricted by the feature mask threshold (same as remesher).
Requires CGAL 6.0+.

InputProperty.name: Selection
InputProperty.label: Selection
InputProperty.Documentation: Optional vtkSelection used when Remesh region source is "Selection (port 1)" (default). Scalar range mode ignores this port for the expanded patch; see vtkSHYXAdaptiveIsotropicRemesher.

IntVectorProperty.name: RemeshRegionMode
IntVectorProperty.label: Remesh region source
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Same meaning as vtkSHYXAdaptiveIsotropicRemesher: patch used for Face_filtered_graph sizing preview.

StringVectorProperty.name: RemeshRangeArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Range array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Point- or cell array for scalar range mode (same rules as the main remesher).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MinEdgeLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Min edge length
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Minimum edge length; must be > 0. ParaView BoundsDomain (scaled_extent 0.001) suggests 0.1% of the input axis-aligned bounding box longest side; use Scale/Reset next to the property.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MaxEdgeLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Max edge length

DoubleVectorProperty.name: AdaptiveTolerance
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Adaptive tolerance
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Vespa ICC adaptive sizing tolerance (preview uses the same sizing class as the main remesher). Smaller values tend to refine more within the Min/Max edge length bounds.

IntVectorProperty.name: FeatureSizingStandAlone
IntVectorProperty.label: Feature sizing stand-alone
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When OFF (default), feature and global sizing maps are numerically identical (same tolerance and min/max on both `v:vespa_size_*` maps). When ON, feature-associated edges preview with separate Feature tolerance and edge-length bounds.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FeatureMinEdgeLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Feature min edge length
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Minimum edge length on feature/constrained edges (used only when Feature sizing stand-alone is ON); must be > 0. ParaView BoundsDomain (scaled_extent 0.001) suggests 0.1% of the input axis-aligned bounding box longest side.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaxEdgeLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Feature max edge length
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Maximum edge length on feature/constrained edges (used only when Feature sizing stand-alone is ON); must be > Feature min edge length. ParaView BoundsDomain (scaled_extent 0.05) suggests 5% of the input axis-aligned bounding box longest side.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FeatureAdaptiveTolerance
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Feature adaptive tolerance
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Vespa ICC tolerance for **`v:vespa_size_feature`** previews (used only when Feature sizing stand-alone is ON).

IntVectorProperty.name: NumberOfRelaxationSteps
IntVectorProperty.label: Relaxation steps
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL vertex-relocation steps per remesh iteration (higher = smoother surface; 0 disables relaxation).

IntVectorProperty.name: DetectFeatureEdges
IntVectorProperty.label: Detect feature edges
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Master switch for sharp-edge / feature-mask constraints. When ON (default), CGAL detect_sharp_edges (with Protection angle / Sharp side filter) and feature-mask region / boundary contributions are added to edge_is_constrained_map for isotropic_remeshing. When OFF, none of those sources contribute; remesh preview only sees vtkSelection-boundary constraints (when a selection input is connected). vtkSelection behavior is independent of this toggle. Output port 1 is empty when OFF.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ProtectAngle
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Protection angle
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Sharp-edge angle threshold in degrees (CGAL detect_sharp_edges). Endpoints of detected sharp edges are protected during the sizing preview constraint setup (same as remesher).

IntVectorProperty.name: SharpFeatureSideFilter
IntVectorProperty.label: Sharp side filter
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Optional filter on interior sharp edges after CGAL detect_sharp_edges, using signed dihedral angle (approximate_dihedral_angle). Excludes concave (signed < 0) or convex (signed > 0) from remesh constraints and from port 1. Boundary edges are unchanged. If convex/concave looks swapped, flip mesh orientation or pick the other entry.

IntVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaskEnabled
IntVectorProperty.label: Use feature mask
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON: threshold input faces to port 2; port 1 sharp features are computed only on that patch; on the full surface, sharp edges are intersected with the mask for CGAL remesh constraint preview. Choose a point- or cell-centered array, a threshold (tuple magnitude > threshold), and the optional All Scalars flag for point arrays. Has no effect when Detect feature edges is OFF.

StringVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaskArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Name of a point- or cell-centered array. If both exist with the same name, cell data is used. Tuple magnitude must be > Threshold for a cell (or per-point corner) to pass.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaskThreshold
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Threshold
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Cells pass when tuple magnitude is strictly greater than this value (scalar or vector magnitude). Typical: 0 to keep values > 0.

IntVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaskAllScalars
IntVectorProperty.label: All scalars
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When the chosen array is point-centered: if ON, every corner of a cell must pass the magnitude test; if OFF, one passing corner is enough (vtkThreshold-style). Ignored when the array resolves to cell data.

IntVectorProperty.name: RemeshProtectConstraints
IntVectorProperty.label: Protect constraints
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL `protect_constraints`. When ON, feature edges are neither split nor collapsed. When OFF, constrained edges may be split or collapsed per CGAL (subject to Collapse constraints below).

IntVectorProperty.name: RemeshCollapseConstraints
IntVectorProperty.label: Collapse constraints
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL `collapse_constraints`. When Protect constraints is OFF, allows collapsing constrained edges. Ignored by CGAL when Protect constraints is ON.

IntVectorProperty.name: RemeshRelaxConstraints
IntVectorProperty.label: Relax constraints
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL `relax_constraints`. When ON, endpoints of constrained and boundary edges may move along constrained polylines during tangential relaxation.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Interpolate attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, point/cell data are interpolated onto the new mesh.
